channel.title: Linux on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on My Linux Journey

item.title: Fix: modprobe FATAL Module dm_mod Not Found in Void Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Encountering ‘modprobe: FATAL: Module dm_mod not found in directory /lib/modules/…’ on Void Linux? This guide walks you through chrooting from a live ISO and rebuilding your initramfs and kernel hooks with xbps-reconfigure.

item.title: Expose Docker App to Internet - Methods Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to exposing Docker apps to the internet. Covers port forwarding, reverse proxies (nginx, caddy), tunneling (cloudflared, ngrok), and security best practices.

item.title: Run Downloaded Website Offline
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to running and displaying websites downloaded with wget for offline viewing. Covers directory structure, local server options, and browser viewing.

item.title: Split .MP3 Chunks - FFmpeg No Re-encoding
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to splitting MP3 files into 5-minute chunks without re-encoding using FFmpeg. Uses -c copy for fast lossless audio extraction.

item.title: Split Large File for FAT32 USB - Linux Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to splitting large files into smaller chunks for FAT32 USB transfer. Uses split command to create 4GB parts and cat to rejoin them.

item.title: Picom Configuration Guide - X11 Compositor
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Comprehensive reference for picom (X11 compositor) configuration. Covers general settings, backend options, transparency, blur, and animations.

item.title: Setup KVM + QEMU + libvirt on Void Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to setting up KVM + QEMU + libvirt on Void Linux. Covers hardware virtualization check, package installation, libvirt configuration, and VM management.

item.title: Mount Android Phone on Linux - File Transfer Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to mounting Android phone on Linux for file transfer. Covers MTP protocol, USB debugging mode, and troubleshooting mount point errors.

item.title: Advanced Terminal Tips and Tricks for Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Advanced terminal tips for Linux power users. Learn bash shortcuts, aliases, functions, tmux, screen, autojump, and essential tools for productivity.

item.title: Alpine Linux Learning Plan - 6 Week Mastery Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: A structured 6-week learning plan to become an Alpine Linux specialist. Covers installation, APK, networking, diskless mode, Docker, and advanced topics.

item.title: Build Minimal Linux Distro - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to building a minimal Linux distro. Covers essential components: kernel, init (BusyBox/systemd/runit), C library, shell, and filesystem.

item.title: Clean XBPS Cache on Void Linux - Free Disk Space
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to cleaning Void Linux package cache using xbps-remove commands. Covers removing all cached packages, obsolete packages, and manual cleanup.

item.title: Common Linux Security Mistakes and How to Fix Them
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to common Linux security mistakes and their fixes. Covers running as root, weak passwords, missing firewalls, unpatched systems, and proper security practices.

item.title: Install CUPS on Void Linux - Printer Setup Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to installing CUPS on Void Linux. Covers installation via XBPS, runit service configuration, web interface access, and printer management.

item.title: Install Pi-hole on Alpine Linux - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to installing Pi-hole on Alpine Linux. Covers dependencies, installation, router DNS configuration, and admin interface access.

item.title: Install Sway on Void Linux - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Step-by-step guide to install Sway on Void Linux. Includes seatd setup, greetd display manager, waybar configuration, and troubleshooting.

item.title: Install Wayland Compositors on Void Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to installing Wayland compositors on Void Linux. Covers Sway, labwc, wayfire, seatd, and display manager setup.

item.title: Install XFCE on Void Linux - All Methods Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Comprehensive guide to installing XFCE on Void Linux. Covers meta-package, minimal components, display managers, startx, XWayland, VNC, and Docker methods.

item.title: Linux iptables Firewall Guide - Complete Tutorial
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to Linux iptables firewall. Covers tables (filter, nat, mangle), chains (INPUT, OUTPUT, FORWARD), targets (ACCEPT, DROP, REJECT), and practical firewall rules.

item.title: Linux Kernel Explained - Types and Functions
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Comprehensive explanation of the Linux kernel. Covers kernel functions, memory management, device management, device drivers, and kernel types (monolithic, microkernel, hybrid).

item.title: Linux System Information Commands - Complete Reference
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete reference for Linux system information commands. Learn to use lscpu, free, df, lsblk, lspci, ip, and other tools for monitoring.

item.title: List Installed Packages on Void Linux - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to listing installed packages on Void Linux. Uses xbps-query to show all packages, manually installed programs, versions, and orphaned dependencies.

item.title: Sound Setup on Void Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to configuring audio on Void Linux. Covers ALSA, PulseAudio, PipeWire setup, alsamixer, and troubleshooting sound issues.

item.title: Watch YouTube Videos with mpv Player - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to using mpv with YouTube support. Covers yt-dlp installation, playback controls, streaming YouTube from terminal, and advanced options.

item.title: Build libmount and mount from Source on Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to building libmount and mount from source. Covers util-linux compilation, library linking, and fixing version mismatches.

item.title: Configure Monitors with xrandr on Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to configuring monitors with xrandr on Linux. Create scripts to detect HDMI connections and automatically set display resolution and position.

item.title: FFmpeg Screen Recording - Command Breakdown
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete breakdown of FFmpeg screen recording commands. Covers video capture, pulse/alsa audio input, and encoding options for Linux.

item.title: FFmpeg Screen Recording Script - Linux Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to FFmpeg screen recording on Linux. Script breakdown for capturing desktop, microphone, and audio with real-time monitoring.

item.title: Filebrowser Configuration Guide - Complete Reference
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete reference for filebrowser configuration. Covers all CLI flags, configuration file options, and environment variables for self-hosted file browser.

item.title: Fix Sound Switching to USB Microphone on Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to fixing audio device switching on Linux. Prevent system from switching to USB microphone as default output. Uses PulseAudio and ALSA configuration.

item.title: Install Local XBPS Packages on Void Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to installing downloaded XBPS packages on Void Linux manually. Uses xbps-rindex to index packages and xbps-install to install locally.

item.title: Runit Service Management on Void Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to Runit service management on Void Linux. Covers sv up, down, restart, status, and service enabling/disabling.

item.title: Transfer Files Over SSH - scp, rsync, sshfs Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to file transfer over SSH. Covers scp, rsync, sshfs mounting, and FileZilla SFTP client for secure file sharing.

item.title: How to Setup WiFi on Alpine Linux with wpa_supplicant
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Get a MediaTek or other USB WiFi adapter working on Alpine Linux using wpa_supplicant — step-by-step from driver install to boot persistence.

item.title: Working with Files and Tabs in Vim - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to working with files and tabs in Vim. Covers opening files, saving, tab management, and multiple file workflows in the vim text editor.

item.title: Install Bliss OS on Linux - Complete Manual Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Manual installation guide for Bliss OS on Linux. Covers ISO download, Grub configuration, and step-by-step installation for PC running Linux.

item.title: Install DWM and ST on Void Linux - Suckless Tools
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to installing DWM (Dynamic Window Manager) and ST terminal on Void Linux. Covers build from source, patches, and configuration.

item.title: Blog
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Comprehensive blog posts section with tested guides on Linux administration, distro installations, virtualization, Android custom ROMs, development tools, and productivity tips.

item.title: Linux Knowledge Base
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Your complete Linux knowledge base with tutorials on system administration, QEMU virtualization, Void Linux, Alpine Linux, networking, iptables, shell scripting, and Linux kernel concepts.

item.title: Tutorials - Linux, Android & Development Guides
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Comprehensive tutorials section with tested guides on Linux administration, distro installations, virtualization, Android custom ROMs, development tools, and productivity tips.

item.title: Display Server vs Display Manager vs Window Manager - Explained
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete explanation of display server, display manager, and window manager. Covers X11, Wayland, LightDM, SDDM, and window managers like i3, Openbox.

item.title: Linux Kernel Insights - What I Learned
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Collection of insights about the Linux kernel. Covers checking kernel version, system calls, kernel modules, and core Linux kernel concepts.
